title: patch_heading input schema
description: Input contract for the patch_heading typed MCP tool. Authoritative source is the Zod schema in src/tools/patch_heading/schema.ts; this JSON Schema is the human-readable cross-reference and the form published via zodToJsonSchema at registration time. Uses the project's target_mode discriminator per ADR-003 — in specific mode, vault is required plus one of file/path; in active mode, none of vault/file/path may appear.

target_mode.description: Locator-shape discriminator per ADR-003. 'specific' = caller supplies vault + file|path. 'active' = wrapper resolves the currently-focused note via a small obsidian eval; no vault/file/path may be supplied.

vault.description: Vault display name. REQUIRED when target_mode === 'specific'; FORBIDDEN when target_mode === 'active'. Resolved via the project's lazy vault registry. Unknown vault surfaces CLI_REPORTED_ERROR + details.code: VAULT_NOT_FOUND.

file.description: Vault-relative file path. Alternative to 'path'; exactly one of {file, path} required when target_mode === 'specific'. Subject to the project's structural path-safety refinement (no '../', no leading '/' or '\\', no drive-letter prefix, no control characters). Layer 2 canonical-path check (post-validation) rejects symlink-escape with PATH_ESCAPES_VAULT.

path.description: Vault-relative file path. Alternative to 'file'; exactly one of {file, path} required when target_mode === 'specific'. Same constraints as 'file'.

heading_path.description: Hierarchical heading-path locator. Segments are joined by the literal '#' character per FR-004 (cohort parity with Obsidian wikilink anchors like [[note#Top#Sub]]). MUST contain at least two segments (a single-segment path that would address a top-level heading directly is out of scope per FR-002). No segment may be empty (no '##' or leading/trailing '#'). Validation rejects with VALIDATION_ERROR + details.code: INVALID_HEADING_PATH + details.reason in {empty, empty-segment, contains-hash, single-segment, too-long}. Headings whose literal text contains '#' are permanently unreachable through this tool (FR-005).

mode.description: Placement mode per FR-009. 'append' = insert at end of the heading's full reach (immediately before the next equal-or-higher-rank heading, or EOF), preserving body + child subtrees. 'prepend' = insert immediately after the heading marker line, preserving body + child subtrees. 'replace' = swap the direct body (content between marker line and first child heading, or marker line and next equal-or-higher-rank heading if no child), preserving marker line + child subtrees.

content.description: The text to insert (append/prepend) or to swap in as the new direct body (replace). For mode='append' or mode='prepend', MUST be non-empty (empty content surfaces VALIDATION_ERROR + details.code: EMPTY_CONTENT + details.reason: <mode>). For mode='replace', empty content is accepted as the legitimate 'clear the direct body' operation per FR-018a.
